product_owner_confirmation: Console reviewed personally: exactly 1 API request visible for the NABCor workspace, model shown as Claude Haiku 4.5; per-request tokens and per-request cost not surfaced by the console; monthly hard spend cap USD 60 active; auto-reload disabled. notes: Provider console did not expose per-request token counts, per-request cost, or the request id at this latency/granularity, so cost could not be compared to the cent; documented as a precision limitation rather than a silent match. Local settled_usd 0.01 is itself a cent-granular ceiling rounded up from the computed 0.000315 (240 in / 15 out at Haiku 1/5 per Mtok), so it is a conservative upper bound and <= USD 0.25. Request count (1) and model (Haiku 4.5) matched exactly; hard cap confirmed active.
